blocks.content: Inside the inner castle of Jive, Uorin sat in deep thought with her lips tightly sealed.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Whistle…
Havitz, leaning against her back, whistled and blew out a puff of Asker smoke.

blocks.speaker: Meirei
blocks.content: I can hear the sound of your heart.
It was Meirei's ability, the frequency of the gods.

blocks.speaker: Meirei
blocks.content: When you saw Shirone, the sound you made… it was probably close to pain, wasn't it?
Uorin finally spoke.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: If you had asked me to yield, I would have.

blocks.speaker: Meirei
blocks.content: Do you also have delusions?
Silence fell again before Havitz spoke.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: The reason I didn't kill you at first was because you said you had someone you loved. I was curious. I couldn't hear the sound of your heart back then. But now that I hear it, it seems you love in a way similar to mine.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Have you ever been in love?

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Well, if what you're doing now is love, then I do it every day. Maybe every second.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: People, you see, they have this illusion that if there's a word for something, it must exist. Love, success, failure, happiness, misery. What did they do before those words existed?
His eyes were glazed from the drug, but his emotions were much calmer than usual.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Erase all the words in your mind. Your heart still beats, and your body still wants something. Whatever it is, you'll achieve it. As long as you don't define it.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Is that what Vanishing is?

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: There you go again.
Havitz threw his cigarette butt at a Jive official who was watching him in horror.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Trying to confine it with words makes it complicated. If you divide your thoughts, you can't feel the whole. It doesn't have to be love. What's important is what that feeling is.
Uorin felt bitter.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Receiving comfort from Satan. Maybe it means I've fallen that far.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: What did it matter?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Desperate desires are always close, while God is distant for humans.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: ...Can I achieve it? If I don't define my feelings for Shirone, can I reach that something, that feeling I want?

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Of course.
There was no desire Havitz hadn't achieved.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: You can definitely do it.
His face, smiling up at the sky, was as pure as a child's.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: The weather is nice.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Today too…

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: May everyone in this world achieve what they desire.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Without exception.
At the fountain square visible from the Vatican, Shirone, Iruki, and Neide were deep in thought.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: How about sneaking in? If Shirone's identity is revealed, the Holy Knights will move. You know how troublesome they are.
Iruki rested his chin on his hand.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Hmm. But would it be the same inside the Vatican? As far as I know, the Lami faith isn't particularly aggressive. They maintain a respectable public image.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It depends. The Lami faith's attitude towards other religions is divided into two: heresy and apostasy. If you believe in a god other than Cria, you're considered heretical and generally ignored. But I…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm considered apostate. A religion that calls itself God. In such cases, the Lami faith has always been aggressive in suppression. This time won't be different.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: But you've never claimed to be God, and you haven't founded a religion.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: It's about reputation. Many people already see Shirone as a messiah. If they dismiss other gods as fake, that's one thing. But if a real person is worshipped as a god…

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: It's fatal to the Lami faith. It directly contradicts their doctrine of monotheism.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: That's why the Holy Knights are so hostile to Shirone. Approaching them with the idea that it's just a different religion is dangerous.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was certainly true.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But! Revealing it openly isn't right either. We can't just fight here.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: How about using an alias? It has to be someone who can attract the Pope's attention.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go straight.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If we plan it, meeting Pope Constantine won't be difficult. But I can't assert my claim that way. Besides, the Pope will soon leave for the Holy War. There's something I want to confirm before that.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Alright. Let's formally request an audience. If the Holy Knights attack, I'll be the villain.
Inside the Vatican, they found the office between the Diocese Management Department and the Holy Knights Department.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Excuse me.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Welcome, servants of Cria. What brings you to the Holy See?

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: We'd like to meet Pope Constantine. We must see him before he leaves for the Holy War.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: What?
The priest blinked and then scratched his head after checking their ages.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Well, they are at that age.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I want to speak with Pope Constantine. Tell him Yahweh requests an audience.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Y-Yahweh?
At the same time, all the priests in the office stood up and looked at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: What? Yahweh?
Of course, he wasn't a villain.
He wasn't a murderer or a terrorist, but some priests' eyes were not kind.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: Hmm.
Comparing Shirone's appearance with the rumors, he bit his lip.
It seems true.
No one would lie about such a thing in the Vatican unless they had a death wish.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: If you are truly Yahweh, you must know what this place is. Is this a declaration of war?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I don't intend to fight. There's no reason to. I just have a message for the Pope.
To address the Pope directly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How arrogant…!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The head priest's eyes filled with anger, but Shirone didn't back down this time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Constantine.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I think he's a good person.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But can anyone in the world truly distinguish between good and bad people?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even if they could.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could we still call them human?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: At that point, they would have transcended humanity, like Miro being the epitome of good and Havitz the epitome of evil.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Of course, Shirone was included in this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It won't take long. Please let me meet him. I'll be attending the Holy War anyway, and I can meet the Pope there. The reason I came now is that there's an issue that needs to be addressed by the Vatican.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Ahem.
The Vatican knew more about the Holy War, so there was no room for argument.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: I'll inform him. But if the Pope refuses, there's nothing we can do.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thank you.
Two priests, following the head priest's orders, ran down the corridor and split left and right.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Two.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Diocese Management Department and the Holy Knights Department.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They won't let me go easily. But the Pope will meet me. To maintain authority at the Holy War, he must negotiate with me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The next issue was,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How will the Pope answer my question? If it's a human answer, I'll accept it. But if…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If the answer denies humanity,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There will be blood.
Holy Knights Department.
Senior Holy Knight Seina, from the Oracle Management Department, stood in front of a mirror in her ivory armor.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Oh God.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Her golden bob and pure face were so beautiful that one could believe they were crafted by God.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Punish me.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: But to her, a Holy Knight, the body was just a shell containing her faith.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Erase the doubt within me, oh God.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Her divine power had weakened.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Why is this happening? Nothing has changed. Why do I doubt my life, everything I've achieved…

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: When did she start doubting?

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: It began when she returned to the Vatican after meeting Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Shirone, wasn't it?

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: When she knelt to the temptation of the abyss, Yahweh had rushed to baptize her.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: I had resolved to martyr myself. I wasn't afraid of death. But why…

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Why did she cry?

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: The moment Shirone's hand struck her forehead, a terrible evil was expelled.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Maybe…

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Maybe it wasn't just the demon that was expelled?

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: No!

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: My heart couldn't have been swayed by him. This is the price for succumbing to the abyss.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: It was easier to be a defeated victim of evil than a traitor to her faith.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: But…

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Recalling the brilliance of the light that had overwhelmed her, she became dazed again.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Seina, are you in there?

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Ah! Yes!
Hearing the voice outside, Seina hurriedly turned, equipping her holy sword.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Leon.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: We're on patrol duty this week, Seina. Was I too early? There's still five minutes left.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Oh, no. I'm sorry.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Seina wasn't particularly unsociable, but Leon always made her uncomfortable.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: The reason was probably…

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: It's been a while since we were on patrol together. It seems Cria has answered my prayers.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Because he was too light-hearted.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Holy Knights are forbidden to marry. Our bodies and souls are already dedicated to God.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Perhaps sensing her discomfort, Leon changed the subject.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Since your report, the Holy Knight training program is being revived. The subordinates are complaining a lot, haha. It was really tough during our time.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: It was.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Since childhood, Seina had undergone rigorous training to become a servant of God.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: It was certainly her pride.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: But why?

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Since being baptized by Yahweh, she found the entire process repulsive.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: This doubt is making me weak. Get a grip, Seina. You're a paladin.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: She's truly amazing.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Holy Knights were forbidden to marry, but the doctrine wasn't imposed on laypeople.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: If I gave up my position as a Holy Knight, would Seina…

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: As he indulged in such fantasies, a priest came running down the corridor.

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Temi? What's wrong?

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Ah, Seina! Leon!

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: There's trouble! Right now, at the Vatican… I mean, in this holy Vatican…!

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Calm down. What's going on?

blocks.speaker: Priest
blocks.content: Yahweh is here! He boldly entered through the front gate! He wants to see the Pope!

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: What are you talking about?

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: At that moment, he turned at the sound of heavy breathing behind him and his eyes widened.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Seina?

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Yahweh…

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Unable to control her rapidly beating heart, she asked in a daze, 'He's here?'
The waves of light flickered before her eyes like an afterimage.
